creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Gavin,

It is not the intention to move this port to libressl24.

The security/libressl port will shortly be updated to 2.4 in stead.
As long as LibreSSL 2.5 (for OpenBSD 6.1) has not been created, the security/libressl and security/libressl-devel ports will be the same version.

Thanks for reporting!

Bernard.
